{{Infobox character
|nom=Father William
|apparition=Appears in book 1
|status=Unknown
}}

== Biography ==

Father William is an elderly man with white hair who has grown uncommonly fat. He is notable for his unusual physical abilities, including his capacity to stand on his head and perform back-somersaults. According to his own account, he feared in his youth that standing on his head might injure his brain; however, having since become convinced that he possesses no brain, he continues to perform the feat repeatedly.

== References ==

- Alice's Adventures in Wonderland

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Secondary Characters]]
[[Category:Personnages du Tome 1]]
